summary: Iteration 21: Full testing of NEW features (Layout Toggle, Transcript Analysis, Chat Persistence). Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout Toggle: All three layout buttons (Stack, Split, Carousel) working correctly
Split layout: 50/50 lock button appears when Split is selected and disappears for other layouts
Split layout: Resizable panels with react-resizable-panels working correctly
Carousel layout: embla-carousel-react integration working - prev/next navigation and model tabs visible with 2+ responses
Layout preference persists to localStorage correctly
Analysis Page: Upload tab has all required inputs (transcript textarea, model selector, goal input, constraints input, analyze button)
Analysis Page: Backend makes 2 LLM calls (parse transcript + generate narrative) - working correctly with ~30s total time
Analysis Page: Report view shows summary metrics bars, narrative summary, flagged turns, and turn cards with EDCM metrics
Analysis Page: History tab shows previous reports and clicking loads full report
Chat Persistence: sessionStorage stores current thread_id
Chat Persistence: Page reload maintains thread and messages
Chat Persistence: Thread sidebar shows all historical threads
seed_data_creation: Multiple analysis reports created during testing. Multiple chat threads created including multi-model thread with gpt-4o-mini and gemini-2.0-flash.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested NEW features: layout toggle (Stack/Split/Carousel), transcript analysis (/api/v1/analysis/*), and chat persistence. All features working. Analysis endpoint makes 2 LLM calls and takes 30-60s. Carousel/Split layouts require 2+ model responses to show navigation/panels.

details.auth_login_success: PASS - Returns access_token and user object
details.analysis_transcript_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/v1/analysis/transcript returns AnalysisReport with turns, metrics, flags, narrative
details.analysis_reports_list: PASS - GET /api/v1/analysis/reports returns list of user's reports
details.thread_messages_persist: PASS - Messages can be retrieved after creation
details.keys_status: PASS - Returns key status for developers

details.split_lock_button: Appears when Split layout selected, hidden for other layouts
details.localStorage_persistence: Layout preference saved and restored correctly

details.navigation_via_header_button: FileUp button in chat header navigates to /analysis
details.upload_tab_elements: Transcript textarea, model selector, goal input, constraints input, analyze button all present
details.report_tab: Shows summary metrics bars, narrative summary, turn cards after analysis
details.submit_analysis: Successfully analyzed sample transcript - 4 turns parsed, all flagged, narrative generated

details.carousel_with_2_models: Carousel navigation (prev/next) and model tabs visible
details.split_layout_panels: Side-by-side panels rendered with resize handle

mocked_apis.details: All LLM calls are real using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY

features_verified: Layout toggle: Stack button (default) visible and clickable
Layout toggle: Split button visible and clickable
Layout toggle: Carousel button visible and clickable
Layout toggle: When Split selected, 50/50 lock button appears
Layout toggle: Layout preference persists in localStorage
Multi-model prompt: Sent to gpt-4o-mini and gemini-2.0-flash, both responses received
Carousel layout: Navigation buttons and model tabs visible with 2+ responses
Split layout: Side-by-side panels with resize handle
Analysis page: Navigates via FileUp button in header
Analysis page: Upload tab has transcript textarea, model selector, goal/constraints inputs, analyze button
Analysis page: Submit transcript returns report with turns, EDCM metrics per turn, flags, narrative summary
Analysis page: History tab shows previous reports
Backend: POST /api/v1/analysis/transcript works with full EDCM analysis
Chat persistence: Thread ID saved to sessionStorage
Chat persistence: Messages persist after page reload
Existing features: Login, thread sidebar, settings, model selector developer tabs still working
